title: Priests and Warriors Collide
description: Enel’s priests and the Shandia warriors clash as the Straw Hats are drawn into the hidden war over Upper Yard.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, 19, 20, this scene centers on Gan Fall, Shandia warrior, Usopp, Luffy, Wyper. Enel’s priests and the Shandia warriors clash as the Straw Hats are drawn into the hidden war over Upper Yard.

dialogue.speaker: Shandia warrior
dialogue.text: Ahhh, I'm sorry you have a

dialogue.speaker: Shandia warrior
dialogue.text: Let go of it! You idiot!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Perfect! The boat is right over there!!

dialogue.speaker: Shandia warrior
dialogue.text: Okay!! I'll go in a straight path!!

dialogue.speaker: Shandia warrior
dialogue.text: That's pretty good!! Watch for the Orbs!!

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: Call me the King of the Forest!!

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: The rope is fixed on the belt

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: But now you listen to my orders!

summary: Enel’s priests and the Shandia warriors clash as the Straw Hats are drawn into the hidden war over Upper Yard.
